title: 7 Searching for Cheques, Suspect Duplicates, Chargebacks, and AFT Transactions on ORS
body_text:
7	Searching for Cheques, Suspect Duplicates, Chargebacks, and AFT Transactions on ORS
7.1	Overview of Searching for Cheques, Suspect Duplicates, Chargebacks, and AFT Transactions on ORS
This Chapter describes how to search for cheques (Incoming Clearing Items only), Suspect Duplicates, Chargebacks, and AFT transactions on ORS. Once an item is located on ORS, an authorized user can view the item and take further action (e.g., return the item, print the item). See Section 1.2, ORS Service Windows, Image Availability, and Archive for information on the availability of AFT transactions and cheque images on ORS.
Note:	See Chapter 11, Deposit Research on ORS, for procedures on searching for, viewing, printing, and saving cheque deposits.
7.2	Searching for Cheques on ORS
Proceed as follows to search for cheques (Incoming Clearing Items) on ORS:
Log in to ORS and select
Search
on the ORS menu bar. See Figure 1.
Figure 1: ORS Menu Bar
Enter the search criteria. The system response time improves with the use of additional search criteria. For example, instead of searching for all items for all branches on a given date, choose a specific branch and dollar amount. See Figure 2. Completion of this screen is self-explanatory, but note the following:
â
When searching by account number, enter the full MICR account number encoded on the cheque.
â
To search by membership number, use the wildcard (%) symbol. For example, enter â%123456â to find all cheques for membership number 123456.
Figure 2: Cheque Search
Select
Submit
or press
Enter
.
View the search results. See Figure 3.
Figure 3: Search Results Page
Note:	To change the order, select any of the column headings. Select the
A
link to view the original sort order.
Note:	A maximum of 200 items will appear in the search results. If there are more than 200 items, the search results will be separated into multiple pages.
Select
Previous Cheque Query
to return to the previous search query, or
Search
to start a new search.
Related Information
Section 8.1
, Viewing and Printing Cheque Images on ORS
Appendix #A-1
, ORS Cheque Search Fields
Appendix #A-4
, ORS Search Results Grid
7.3	Searching for Suspect Duplicates on ORS
Central 1 evaluates all items drawn on your financial institution within a 180-day period. If a suspected duplicate cheque is detected, both items are flagged as suspicious. A cheque is considered a duplicate if it has the same cheque number, account number, Transit Number, and amount as another cheque. Your financial institution must view items flagged as suspicious and determine if they are duplicates. If the item is a duplicate, return it on ORS within 90 calendar days of the clearing date.
Note:	Central 1 cannot guarantee the identification of all duplicate cheques and offers this service on a best-efforts basis.
Proceed as follows to search for suspect duplicates:
Select the
Suspect Duplicates
tab. See Figure 4.
Figure 4: Suspect Duplicates tab
Enter search criteria and select
Submit
. See Figure 5.
Figure 5: Searching for Suspect Duplicates
View the search results. See Figure 6. Select the appropriate item(s) to view as described in Section 8.1, Viewing and Printing Cheque Images on ORS.
Figure 6: Suspect Duplicates Search Results
Use the
D
link under the A column to list the item(s) that triggered the potential duplicate.
If applicable, the duplicate can be returned directly in ORS by selecting the
E
link under the A column, or reinstated by selecting the
R
link. For more information, see Chapter 9, Returning Cheques on ORS, and Chapter 12, Reinstating Cheques on ORS.
7.4	Searching for Chargebacks on ORS
A Chargeback is a Canadian or US dollar item deposited by your financial institution that is dishonoured and returned by the drawee financial institution. Items can be returned in a Return Item Carrier Envelope (RICE), or as a Return Replacement Document (RRD). When Central 1 receives a Chargeback from a drawee financial institution, the item is captured as an image of either a paper cheque being dishonoured and its RICE envelope, or an RRD (as applicable). The RRD contains an image of the dishonoured item and the applicable return information (e.g., return reason code). Central 1 uploads the images to ORS for financial institutions to view, print, and adjust their customersâ accounts.
Since physical copies of RICEs and RRDs arenât returned to financial institutions, financial institution staff use ORS to obtain the information necessary to debit the depositing customer. For information on the processing and settlement of Chargebacks, see the Incoming Clearing Items Part.
Note: 	Misdirected Chargebacks cannot be returned on ORS and must be returned manually. See the Dishonour and Return of Cheques Part for procedures.
Proceed as follows to search for Chargebacks on ORS:
Log in to ORS and select the
Chargebacks
link on the ORS menu bar. See Figure 7.
Figure 7: Chargebacks Link
Enter the search criteria as described below. See Figure 8. To search for all Chargebacks on the current day (e.g., when reviewing Chargebacks each morning to debit customers):
â
Select
All
in the Transit
field.
â
Leave the default date.
â
Leave the other fields blank.
Figure 8: Chargeback Search
To search for a specific Chargeback (e.g., for reconciliation), use additional filters to streamline the search. Complete the fields on the Chargebacks Search page as follows:
â
Transit
â Use the drop-down menu to select the Transit Number to which the Chargeback was returned.
â
Account
â Leave this field blank. This field may be pre-populated when exchanging image files with other financial institutions.
â
From
â Use the calendar icon to select a date.
â
To
â Use the calendar icon to select a date.
â
Amount
â Enter the amount of the Chargeback. Include cents (e.g., 1000.00).
â
Currency
â Use the drop-down menu to select
All
,
CAD
, or
USD
.
â
Cheque
#
â Leave this field blank. This field may be pre-populated when exchanging image files with other financial institutions.
â
Trace
#
â Enter the Chargebackâs trace number (maximum 10 digits).
â
Return Code
â Leave this field blank. Currently this field isnât populated on incoming Chargebacks, but this field may be pre-populated when exchanging image files with other FIs.
Select
Submit
or press
Enter
.
View the search results. See Figure 9. Select the appropriate item(s) to view as described in Chapter 8, Viewing, Printing, and Saving Cheque Images and AFT Transactions on ORS.
Figure 9: Chargebacks Search Results
Note:	To change the order, select on any of the column headings. Select the
A
link to view the original sort order.
Note:	Chargebacks without a T
link in the A
column are RRDs. When there is no T
link, the user can see all the details necessary to charge the item to the customer by selecting the
P
link on the Chargeback Search Results.
Select
Previous Chargebacks Query
to return to the previous search query. Select the
Chargebacks
tab to start a new search.
Proceed as follows
to view Chargeback items associated with a RICE:
Select the
T
link to view the RICE, and the back and front of the associated item. When printing or saving items from the search results, users will need to select the
T
link on each individual RICE item to print or save. See Figure 10 and Figure 11.
Figure 10: Individual RICE
Figure 11: Multiple RICE
Select
T
to view the Chargeback item associated with the RICE. See Figure 12.
Figure 12: Selecting the T link
Select the box in the
V
column and select
Submit
. See Figure 13.
Figure 13: Viewing Chargeback
Select the
P
link in the A column to print the cheque image (front and back). See Figure 14.
Figure 14: Viewing Chargeback and RICE
7.5	Searching for AFT Transactions on ORS
Proceed as follows to search for AFT transactions on ORS:
Log in to ORS and select
Search
on the ORS menu bar. See Figure 15.
Figure 15: ORS Menu Bar
Select
aft
on the top menu bar. See Figure 16.
Figure 16: AFT Option
Enter the search criteria. The system response time improves with the use of additional search criteria. For example, instead of searching for all items for all branches on a given date, choose a specific branch and dollar amount. See Figure 17.
Figure 17: AFT Search
Note:	When searching by account number, enter the full account number including the account type. To search by membership number, use the wildcard (%) symbol. For example, enter â%123456â to find all cheques for membership number 123456.
Select
Submit
or press
Enter
.
View the search results. See Figure 18.
Figure 18: Search Results Page
Note:	Change the order of the items in the grid by selecting any of the column headings.
Note:	A maximum of 200 items will appear in the search results. If there are more than 200 items, the search results will be separated into multiple pages.
Select the previous
AFT Query
to return to the previous search criteria, or select
Search
, then the
AFT
option.
Related Information
Section 8.2
, Viewing and Printing AFT Transactions on ORS
Appendix #A-2
, ORS AFT Search Fields
Appendix #A-4
, ORS Search Results Grid
7.6	Searching for Cheques and AFT Transactions (Combined Search) on ORS
Proceed as follows to search for cheques and AFT transactions simultaneously on ORS:
Log in to ORS and select the
Search
link on the ORS menu bar. See Figure 19.
Figure 19: ORS Menu Bar
Select
combined
on the top menu bar. See Figure 20.
Figure 20: Combined Option
Enter search criteria. The system response time improves with the use of additional search criteria. For example, instead of searching for all items for all branches on a given date, choose a specific branch and dollar amount. See Figure 21.
Figure 21: Combined Search Page
Select
Submit
or press
Enter
.
View the search results. See Figure 22.
Figure 22: Search Results Page
Note:	Change the order of the items in the grid by selecting any of the column headings.
Select the previous
Combined Query
link to return to the previous search query, or select
Search
and then
Combined
.
Related Information
Section 8.3
, Viewing and Printing Cheque Images and AFT Transactions (Combined Search) on ORS
Appendix #A-3
, ORS Combined Search Fields
Appendix #A-4
, ORS Search Results Grid
END
